explicitExclusions.reason: User-directed read-only preservation boundary outside the Admin scan target; no Win7POS files were modified or scanned.

openQuestions.followUpPrompt: Inspect Cloudflare and application rate-limit configuration for the four product-image routes at 2f166b51e7d3ff68f8f01593cb68845788e7be9a, without treating throttling as a substitute for tenant authorization.
openQuestions.question: Do deployment-edge controls rate-limit repeated denied product-image requests?

surfaces.label: Product-image route authorization and privileged denial audit
surfaces.notes: Four independently triggerable denied routes share one missing actor/shop and product/shop guard in product_image_record_denied; each became a canonical finding instance.
surfaces.riskArea: Tenant authorization and service-role confused deputy

surfaces.label: Product-image service, request contracts, JPEG validation, Storage, and browser cache
surfaces.notes: Reviewed full service and browser flows; authorization-rechecking RPCs, canonical paths, immutable uploads, byte verification, and scoped cache keys closed the evaluated hypotheses.
surfaces.riskArea: Signed capabilities, canonical paths, validation, cache isolation, and lifecycle races

surfaces.label: Admin product-image UI, page access, and permission presentation
surfaces.notes: Server-derived permissions remain authoritative; React escaping and scoped identifiers prevented a surviving UI or client-side candidate.
surfaces.riskArea: UI-only authorization, XSS, signed URL exposure, and cache-scope propagation

surfaces.label: Admin data access, read models, staff permission mapping, and generated types
surfaces.notes: Server-resolved shops and explicit permissions remain bound to queries; no cross-shop read or unsafe DTO survived.
surfaces.riskArea: Shop selection, staff authorization, service-role queries, and DTO disclosure

surfaces.label: Supabase product-image, inventory, sync, and cleanup database controls
surfaces.notes: The denial-audit RPC duplicate root cause maps to the reported route instances; other reviewed RLS, sync, cleanup, and service-role controls had no surviving candidate.
surfaces.riskArea: RLS, grants, SECURITY DEFINER functions, transactionality, and shop binding

surfaces.label: POS sales security, sale detail, QA fixture, and native security gates
surfaces.notes: Full-file review found the changed paths fail closed with bounded inputs, service-role-only atomic RPCs, shop constraints, and active gate dispatch.
surfaces.riskArea: Token binding, replay, financial atomicity, fixture exposure, and scanner masking

surfaces.label: Product-image operations, reporting, localization scanner, and package scripts
surfaces.notes: Local/staging allowlists, explicit execution flags, canonical path checks, redacted output, and non-shell npm aliases prevented a surviving operational candidate.
surfaces.riskArea: Destructive target selection, secret logging, command construction, and developer tooling
